title: Beyond Fossil Thinking: Electrifying Our Future Resilience
summary_full: The transition to a low‑carbon economy is no longer a distant ambition—it is an operational imperative. At Sappi, our decarbonisation journey is grounded in practical, scalable interventions that strengthen both environmental performance and long‑term business resilience. To date, our most significant progress has been driven by operational efficiency improvements and fuel switching, particularly through increasing […]
